spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE A: TETRIS GRID for Marketing, MODE B: CONTROL ROOM for Admin

components.button: bg-yellow-400 text-black font-bold uppercase tracking-widest hover:bg-yellow-500 rounded-none px-8 py-4 transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-yellow-400 focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-black
components.input: bg-zinc-900 border border-zinc-800 text-white focus:border-yellow-400 focus:ring-1 focus:ring-yellow-400 rounded-none p-4
components.card: bg-zinc-900/50 border border-white/5 p-8 hover:border-yellow-400/50 transition-colors duration-300
components.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5
components.admin_th: px-4 py-3 font-medium text-white border-b border-white/10 bg-zinc-900/50

motion.hover_state: scale-105 for images, border color shift for cards
motion.marquee: slow continuous scroll for 'ASPHALT ARMOUR - DRIVEWAY SEALCOATING - CRACK FILLING'

hero_bg.location: Home Page Hero Section Background (with bg-black/70 overlay)

home.layout: Hero Section > Marquee Banner > Bento Grid Services Preview > Why Choose Us > CTA
home.special_instructions: Hero section must have a heavy overlay (bg-black/70) to ensure text contrast. Use 'Anton' font for the massive 'ASPHALT ARMOUR' wordmark in the hero. Include a fast marquee with yellow background and black text below the hero.

services.layout: Header > Split-screen sections (Text left, Image right) > Pricing/Benefits > CTA
services.special_instructions: Use sharp, square images. No border-radius. High contrast typographic hierarchy.

quote_form.layout: Centered form container within a grid layout
quote_form.special_instructions: Use Shadcn forms with custom styling (dark backgrounds, yellow focus rings). Make it feel like an industrial application form.

contact.layout: 2-column grid: Left info (Phone, Email, Area), Right (Contact Form)
contact.special_instructions: Include large typography for phone numbers. Use subtle 1px borders.

admin.layout: Sidebar Navigation + Main Data Table View
admin.special_instructions: Use 'Control Room' grid. Tight spacing. High data density. Shadcn Tables for quote submissions. Status badges (e.g., 'New', 'Contacted') should use neon accents.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark Theme. Do not use white backgrounds for main containers.
BORDERS & CORNERS: Use crisp, sharp edges (`rounded-none`). This is an industrial contractor site, not a friendly SaaS app. Hard lines communicate strength and 'armour'.
TYPOGRAPHY: Import Cabinet Grotesk (headings), IBM Plex Sans (body), and Anton (logo wordmark) from Google Fonts/Fontshare or implement directly.
CONTRAST: All text must meet APCA contrast ratios. If text overlays an image, use text-shadow or a dark gradient behind the text.
COMPONENTS: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for the marketing pages to achieve the Bento grids and overlapping elements. Use Shadcn exclusively for the Admin Dashboard and Forms.
ICONS: Use @phosphor-icons/react with 'bold' or 'duotone' weight for industrial feel. Run `yarn add @phosphor-icons/react`.
DATA ATTRIBUTES: Add `data-testid` to all interactive elements.
FILE EXTENSIONS: Ensure you are providing guidelines and generating code for .js/.jsx files (not .tsx).
